channel.title: briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Inside the Debacle That Led to the Closure of El Paso’s Airspace
item.description: The F.A.A., citing “a grave risk of fatalities” from a new technology being used on the Mexican border, got caught in a stalemate with the Pentagon, w...

item.title: How ICE Failed to Justify the Shooting of Julio Sosa-Celis in Minneapolis
item.description: The collapse of the Trump administration’s version of events in the case was only the most recent instance in which officials gave an account of a sho...

item.title: ChatGPT promised to help her find her soulmate. Then it betrayed her
item.description: ChatGPT sent screenwriter Micky Small down a fantastical rabbit hole. Now, she's finding her way out.

item.title: Under oath and unredacted: The top political stories on Epstein this week
item.description: Attorney General Pam Bondi faced pointed questions on Capitol Hill, and lawmakers continued to press the Justice Department about its decision to reda...

item.title: After a 2-decade ban, kites fill Lahore's skies during a Pakistani springtime festival
item.description: People gathered on rooftops to enjoy flying kites for the first time in years, celebrating the spring festival of Basant. The activity had been banned...

item.title: Rubio reassures trans-Atlantic ties with Europe at Munich Security Conference
item.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio delivered a calm and reassuring message to America's allies in Munich, after more than a year of President Donald ...

item.title: Sick Detainees Describe Poor Care at CoreCivic ICE Facilities
item.description: Problems at detention centers operated by CoreCivic extend far beyond recent measles outbreaks.

item.title: Dr. Oz pushes AI avatars as a fix for rural health care. Not so fast, critics say
item.description: Dr. Mehmet Oz, who heads the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services, is advancing a $50 billion plan to modernize rural health care.

item.title: T.S.A. Workers Brace for Another Shutdown They Didn’t Cause
item.description: As Congress leaves town without funding their department, airport security officers wonder, “How many more times am I going to be able to do this?”

item.title: Harris Sold Email List to D.N.C., Then Paid Off 2024 Debts
item.description: The national party, which is nearly $100 million behind its G.O.P. counterpart, bought the list for $6.5 million.

item.title: Rubio Stresses Shared History to Europeans but Also Warns of ‘Civilizational Erasure’
item.description: In his speech at the Munich Security Conference, Secretary of State Marco Rubio voiced some far-right ideas, but his diplomatic tone came as a relief ...

item.title: Brazil, the World’s Largest Catholic Nation, Embraces Polyamory
item.description: More people in a still largely conservative and religious nation are rejecting monogamy as they seek new definitions of romance, and of family.

item.title: Japan Releases Chinese Boat Captain After Detaining Him for 30 Hours
item.description: The captain’s arrest had raised fears of a broader diplomatic confrontation between Japan and China, which have been at odds for months.

item.title: Scotty James Is Edged Out by Yuto Totsuka of Japan in the Halfpipe.
item.description: Scotty James of Australia laid down a strong run, but was outdone by Japan’s Yuto Totsuka.

item.title: Live Updates: Rubio Emphasizes Shared History With Europe at Munich Security Conference
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio also echoed the Trump administration’s talking points on the threat of Western decline.
